chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-182 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A No.614/26. For orders on office objections. For orders on M.A No.615/26. For hearing of main case. 12.03.2026. Mr. Ayaz Ali Jalalani, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. ***************************************** 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Through this Petition, the Petitioners seek the following relief(s); a) That this Honourable Court may be pleased to direct the respondents No. 3 to 6 maintain law order and situation and provide legal protection to the petitioners against the highhandedness of the private respondents and their supporters, they further may be directed not to involve the petitioners in any false cases. b) That further this Honourable will deem fit proper and will award the relief in favour of the petitioners. As per contention of Petitioners in their Petition, they seek protection with regard to harassment allegedly caused by the private respondents. Learned A.A.G. Sindh after waiving notice of this petition, states that no harassment would be caused to the petitioners and the police officials shall act strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant Petition is disposed of along with listed application(s) with directions to the police officials to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioners. However, this order would Page 2 of 2 not affect the legal proceedings, if any, pending or subsequently initiated by either party. Let a copy of this order be communicated to concerned official Respondent(s) for compliance.

However, this order would Page 2 of 2 not affect the legal proceedings, if any, pending or subsequently initiated by either party. Let a copy of this order be communicated to concerned official Respondent(s) for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
